a260706p10.summary: The country benefited from a jobs boom after attracting US multinationals, but some of these roles are being cut in the name of AI efficiency.
a260706p10.title: AI-driven drops in labor income and gains in capital income could hit Ireland's tax base, with 6%+ of its workforce in tech and heavy exposure to US companies (Olivia Fletcher/Bloomberg)

a260706p11.summary: The humanoid robotics market is awash in money right now. Last week, AI2 Robotics, a Shenzhen-based startup that makes wheeled humanoid robots …
a260706p11.title: An interview with Agility Robotics CEO Peggy Johnson on why the startup is going public via a SPAC, the physical layer as its core advantage, safety, and more (Connie Loizos/TechCrunch)

a260706p12.summary: Avoiding old-school labor ideology, a new generation of tech workers finds itself divided by the AI boom. — As recently as late May, Choi Seung-ho was hailed as a hero.
a260706p12.title: A profile of Samsung union leader Choi Seung-ho, who helped win a ~$26B bonus package for chip employees, as he tries to resolve the rift over bonus gaps (Yoolim Lee/Bloomberg)

a260706p13.summary: The veteran investor has put himself at the centre of the global AI boom. Some think he now has too much control
a260706p13.title: How Masayoshi Son is remaking SoftBank in his own image, betting on AI; SoftBank trades at a ~50% discount to its net asset value, as some question his strategy (David Keohane/Financial Times)

a260706p14.summary: Csquare Inc., a data center company backed by Brookfield Corp., is seeking to raise as much as $1.35 billion in a US initial public offering.
a260706p14.title: Filing: Brookfield-backed data center company Csquare seeks to raise up to $1.35B in an IPO, selling 50M shares at $23 to $27 each for an up to $4.18B valuation (Ryan Vlastelica/Bloomberg)

a260706p15.summary: Bespoke Labs, an AI agent training platform, raised $40 million across seed and Series A funding, CEO Mahesh Sathiamoorthy tells Axios exclusively.
a260706p15.title: AI agent training platform Bespoke Labs raised $40M across a seed led by 8VC and a Series A led by Wing, saying the funding gives it almost two years of runway (Natalie Breymeyer/Axios)

a260706p16.summary: Anthropic on Monday signed a 20-year lease to use a TeraWulf data center in Kentucky. — The data center, located about an hour southwest …
a260706p16.title: Anthropic signs a 20-year, ~$19B lease to use a TeraWulf data center in Kentucky, set to have a ~400MW capacity and to start delivering power in H2 2027 (CNBC)

a260706p17.summary: Broadcom (AVGO.O) said on Monday it has agreed to expand its partnership with Apple (AAPL.O) through 2031 to develop and supply custom chips …
a260706p17.title: Broadcom agrees to expand its Apple partnership through 2031 to develop and supply custom chips; in 2023, the companies announced a multibillion-dollar 5G deal (Akash Sriram/Reuters)

a260706p18.summary: Reddit Inc. is battling a new kind of spam: stealth marketing content created by brands that want to get mentioned …
a260706p18.title: Reddit says its AI-powered content moderation systems caught 25K "spammy posts and comments" per day in Q1, reducing users' exposure to such content by 20% YoY (Natalie Lung/Bloomberg)

a260706p19.summary: Most of the job losses are in Microsoft's Xbox and commercial sales organizations. … A year after cutting around 9,100 employees …
a260706p19.title: Memo: Microsoft is laying off ~4,800 employees, or ~2.1% of its workforce; most are in sales or Xbox, where ~20% of jobs are set to be cut by the end of FY 2027 (Tom Warren/The Verge)

a260706p20.summary: Compulsion and Double Fine studios will become independent; Undead Labs and Ninja Theory will be sold.
a260706p20.title: Memo: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma says the unit will divest five studios, including Ninja Theory, alongside 3,200 job cuts, to streamline the business, in a "reset" (Bloomberg)

a260706p22.summary: The decision comes alongside an update to the Switch 2 to coincide with European battery regulations.
a260706p22.title: Nintendo plans to stop selling the original Switch, Lite, and OLED in Europe from mid-February 2027 and update the Switch 2 to comply with new EU battery rules (Andrew Webster/The Verge)

a260706p23.summary: Add CBS News on Google — Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker on Monday signed legislation aimed at holding artificial intelligence companies accountable.
a260706p23.title: Illinois Governor JB Pritzker signs SB 315, a bill requiring annual third-party safety audits of leading AI companies; OpenAI and Anthropic backed the bill (Adam Harrington/CBS News)

a260706p24.summary: Mercor hit over $2 billion in gross revenue run rate in June, double its pace earlier this year, according to a person with direct knowledge of the company's financials.
a260706p24.title: Source: Mercor hit over $2B in gross revenue run rate in June, double its pace in April, and is profitable on a free cash flow basis (Julia Hornstein/The Information)

a260706p25.summary: For the past year, the awkward secret of the open-weight model boom has been that many of the strongest Chinese releases …
a260706p25.title: Tencent releases Hy3, a 295B-parameter model that it says is competitive with GLM-5.1 and 5.2, under the Apache 2.0 license, following a preview launch in April (Sam Witteveen/VentureBeat)

a260706p26.summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. is seeking to raise as much as $1.55 billion in a selldown of part of its stake in short-video app operator Kuaishou Technology through a block trade.
a260706p26.title: A term sheet shows Tencent is seeking to raise as much as $1.55B in a selldown of part of its stake in short-video app operator Kuaishou through a block trade (Julia Fioretti/Bloomberg)

a260706p27.summary: The videogame unit's revenue has fallen and its Netflix-like subscription service is far below expectations
a260706p27.title: Source: Xbox Game Pass currently has about 30M subscriptions; document: Microsoft had projected Game Pass subscriptions would reach around 77M this year (Ben Fritz/Wall Street Journal)

a260706p28.summary: Xbox has confirmed that Helen Chiang has been promoted to the role of new chief operating officer in the wake of structural changes at Microsoft.
a260706p28.title: Xbox appoints Helen Chiang as its first COO; Chiang was previously corporate vice president for the Minecraft Franchise and the studio head of Minecraft (Sam Smith/GamesBeat)

a260706p29.summary: The Trump administration's plan to create a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve has been complicated by two government departments vying to run it …
a260706p29.title: Sources: the US considers housing the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve at Commerce instead of Treasury amid concerns over Treasury's legal authority to manage it (Bloomberg)

a260706p30.summary: The U.S. Supreme Court declined on Monday to block a Texas law requiring app stores and developers to verify the age of mobile device users …
a260706p30.title: SCOTUS declines to block a Texas law requiring app stores and developers to verify the age of mobile device users, and for minors to obtain parental consent (Andrew Chung/Reuters)

a260706p31.summary: The U.S. cyber defense agency CISA is using Anthropic's AI model Mythos to audit government software, three people familiar …
a260706p31.title: Sources: CISA's Attack Surface Evaluation team is using Mythos to audit government code repositories and has already uncovered a large number of vulnerabilities (Raphael Satter/Reuters)

a260706p32.summary: Some of the biggest backers of OpenAI and its rivals are pooling their money in an offshoot of Thrive Capital that buys controlling stakes …
a260706p32.title: Source: Thrive Capital spinoff Thrive Holdings seeks to raise around $2B from SoftBank, Altimeter, D1, and others, after previously raising $1B (Julia Hornstein/The Information)

a260706p33.summary: Vista Equity Partners and the investment firm Quinti Capital have teamed up on a takeover offer for French advertising-technology company Criteo SA …
a260706p33.title: Sources: Vista Equity and Quinti made a takeover bid for Criteo that values the French ad tech company at a 50%+ premium to its stock price in recent weeks (Bloomberg)

a260706p34.summary: Quick Take — BonkDAO was hit with a governance attack that appears to have drained approximately $20 million worth of BONK tokens …
a260706p34.title: BonkDAO, which oversees the Bonk memecoin, says it was the target of a "malicious governance proposal" that resulted in a loss of $20M worth of Bonk tokens (Daniel Kuhn/The Block)

a260706p35.summary: As you read this sentence, circuits in your brain are adjusting your posture, controlling your breathing, and transforming lines and curves on the screen into recognizable words.
a260706p35.title: Anthropic researchers detail J-space, a small set of neural patterns in Claude that reveals internal thoughts that don't appear in the model's output (Anthropic)

a260706p36.summary: xAI has officially been rebranded to SpaceXAI. — The change follows SpaceX's historic IPO and acquisition of xAI earlier this year. — Elon Musk previously said xAI would be dissolved and folded into SpaceX. — xAI is no more.
a260706p36.title: xAI rebrands to SpaceXAI and debuts a new logo (Kelsey Vlamis/Business Insider)

a260706p6.summary: South Korean chipmaker SK Hynix (000660.KS) on Monday launched a U.S. share sale to raise 43 trillion won ($28.07 billion) …
a260706p6.title: SK Hynix launches a US share sale on the Nasdaq to raise ~$28B, selling 17.79M new shares; the final listing price is due Thursday before trading starts Friday (Reuters)

a260706p7.summary: Meta and Snap rolled out new smart glasses last month, the latest sign that the industry is racing to put a camera and an AI assistant onto users' faces.
a260706p7.title: Shenzhen-based Even Realities, a startup that makes smart glasses without cameras, raised a $150M pre-Series B led by Meituan and Tencent (Kate Park/TechCrunch)

a260706p8.summary: Quick Take — Ripple said it received CASP authorization from Luxembourg's CSSF, making it fully MiCA-compliant to offer crypto services across 30 EEA countries.
a260706p8.title: Ripple secures CASP authorization from Luxembourg's financial regulator, making it fully MiCA-compliant to offer crypto services across 30 EEA countries (Brian Danga/The Block)

a260706p9.summary: It takes effort to be an informed citizen. Artificial intelligence tools offer an alluring shortcut — but they're not without risk.
a260706p9.title: Some US voters are using AI tools as nonpartisan researchers, seeing them as a viable alternative to traditional news coverage, voter guides, and social media (Jennifer Medina/New York Times)
